name: Raspberry Almond Layer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter; let cool.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two 9-inch round cake pans.
3. Beat egg yolks in a large bowl. Blend apple juice concentrate, butter, and almond extract.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Gradually add to the egg yolk mixture, beating until well-blended. Stir in chopped almonds.
5. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar until stiff peaks form. Gently fold into batter; spread evenly into prepared pans.
6. Bake 18-20 minutes, or until golden brown around edges. Cool in pans on wire racks for 10 minutes. Turn cakes onto racks and cool completely.
7. In a small bowl, beat cream until soft peaks form. Add raspberry fruit spread 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until thick and well-blended.
8. Brush almond liqueur evenly over cake layers. Stack layers and frost top and sides with whipped cream mixture. Press slivered almonds around the edge. Garnish with fresh raspberries if desired.
Nutrition information per slice: 595 calories, 10 gm protein, 59 gm carbohydrate, 36 gm fat, 167 mg cholesterol, 402 mg sodium, 2 diabetic starch/bread exchange, 7 diabetic fat exchange, 1-3/4 diabetic fruit exchange.
